examples.question: Of all the contestants who got voted, what is the contestant number and name of the contestant who got least votes?
examples.schema: CREATE TABLE votes (contestant_number VARCHAR); CREATE TABLE contestants (contestant_number VARCHAR, contestant_name VARCHAR)
examples.ground_truth: SELECT T1.contestant_number, T1.contestant_name FROM contestants AS T1 JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.contestant_number = T2.contestant_number GROUP BY T1.contestant_number ORDER BY COUNT(*) LIMIT 1
examples.base_prediction:
SELECT v.contestant_number, c.contestant_name
FROM votes v
JOIN contestants c ON v.contestant_number = c.contestant_number
GROUP BY v.contestant_number, c.contestant_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;
examples.tuned_prediction: SELECT T1.contestant_number, T1.contestant_name FROM contestants AS T1 JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.contestant_number = T2.contestant_number GROUP BY T1.contestant_number ORDER BY COUNT(*) LIMIT 1
